title: oenothera parviflora var. muricata
intro: Oenothera parviflora var. muricata, also known as the small-flowered evening primrose, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera parviflora var. muricata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine for its versatility and effectiveness.
